blogs.title: Service Mesh with Istio
blogs.description: Implement Istio service mesh for microservices: traffic management, mTLS security, observability with Kiali and Jaeger, canary deployments, and fault injection
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: Containerization Strategies for Microservices
blogs.description: Docker best practices for microservices: multi-stage builds, layer optimization, JVM tuning, health checks, Docker Compose, and Kubernetes deployment strategies
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: Canary Deployments
blogs.description: Implement canary deployments for microservices: gradual traffic shifting, metrics-based rollback, Kubernetes ingress, Istio weighted routing, and feature flag integration
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: Blue-Green Deployment
blogs.description: Implement blue-green deployments for microservices: Kubernetes strategies, Istio traffic switching, zero-downtime deployments, database migrations, and rollback procedures
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari
